---
title: Actualités de l'ALISP
description: >
  un paragraphe de description (ou pas)
listing:
  - id: blog-posts
    contents:
      - "**/*.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    categories: true
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
    fields:
      - date
      - title
      - reading-time
      - image
      - description
      - categories
    feed: true
    image-align: left
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
comments: false
grid:
  margin-width: 400px
margin-footer: |
  <a
    href="{{< var clisp_newsletters >}}"
    class="page-sidebar"
    target="_blank"
    rel="noopener noreferrer">
    <img
      src="/_img/clisp_nl.png"
      alt="Newsletters du CLiSP"
      loading="lazy"
      style="margin-top:1.5rem;">
  </a>
---
